member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Api.Configuration.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Composition-root DI extensions. Keeps Program.cs thin and groups infrastructure wiring so unit tests and integration tests can share configuration.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Api.Configuration.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddAcmeInfrastructure(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Wires Cosmos DB (DefaultAzureCredential), all five repositories, and the stub payment provider. Production deployments MUST override IPaymentProvider with a PCI Level-1 provider per ADR-0003.

member.name: M:Acme.Retail.Api.Configuration.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddAcmeTelemetry(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Wires OpenTelemetry traces and metrics, exporting to Azure Monitor when an App Insights connection string is configured (ApplicationInsights:ConnectionString) — otherwise telemetry stays in-process (useful for local dev and tests).

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Api.Endpoints.CartEndpoint
member.summary: Cart endpoints. Per .eas/policies/zero-trust.md §2 every route requires the OwnsResource policy — the caller's oid/sub claim must match the {customerId} route value.

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Api.Endpoints.CategoriesEndpoint
member.summary: Category list endpoint (anonymous, public storefront browsing).

member.name: T:Acme.Retail.Api.Endpoints.ProductsEndpoint
member.summary: Catalog read endpoints. Anonymous per .eas/policies/zero-trust.md §2 — public listings.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Program type exposed for WebApplicationFactory<Program> integration tests.
